title: CSA Loom federated-search golden query row (SRCH1)
description: One JSON object per JSONL line in content/evals/search/<domain>.jsonl. Scored by the copilot-evaluator Function's searchRelevance mode (hit-rate@k / MRR / NDCG@k) against the REAL /catalog federated search (lib/azure/catalog-search.ts searchCatalog) via the /api/internal/copilot/search-probe route. expectedResults are matched case-insensitively (substring, either direction) against each returned result's qualified name / display name / id, so they target the demo-seed showcase items (scripts/csa-loom/demo-seed.mjs). Azure-native, no Fabric/Power BI dependency.

id.description: Unique row id: '<domain>-<NNN>' (domain = the JSONL basename).

query.description: The text a user types into the /catalog federated search.

expectedResults.description: Item identifiers the federated search SHOULD surface in its top-K (display name / qualified name / id; matched case-insensitively as a substring either direction). Targets the demo-seed showcase items.
